title: SWEET POTATO'S CLOSET - 211info
text: SWEET POTATO'S CLOSET SWEET POTATO'S CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential resources and support to individuals and families, with a special focus on resource families and at-risk youth. Provides clothing, diapers, wipes, toiletries, hygiene items, and other resources. 167 E Main Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Resource families may access resources as needed. Other clients must be engaged with and accompanied by a community partner. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3pm, Friday 1pm-7pm Email (541) 371-2224 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 371-2224 Call or text Jessie Miller Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Resource parents: foster license ID LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Children's Clothing Children's Clothing * Foster Children Clothing Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies * Foster Children Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
